section.title: My vision behind Zewarish.
section.subtitle: Driven by my passion for timeless style, everyday elegance, and thoughtfully curated jewellery.

members.name: Mahvish Siddiqui
members.bio: I carefully curate every Zewarish collection, selecting elegant anti-tarnish jewellery that blends timeless design, everyday comfort, and affordable luxury. My vision is to make premium-looking jewellery accessible for every woman, every day.
